subcodes.title: Words to Habib Mu'ayyad around Dec. 1907
subcodes.first_line: All of this land is Holy Land, and it bears traces of the footsteps of the Divine Prophets. Therefore, every grain of it is sacred and sanctified.
subcodes.first_line_orig: این اراضی مقدسه است تمامش باثر اقدام انبیای الهی متبرک و مشرف شده هر وجبش مقدس است
subcodes.subjects: @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @Shrines and Holy places, @suffering and imprisonment
